case_title: BARBARA LOZA VS. SAN FRANCISCO NETWORK MINISTRIES HOUSING

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF LOZA, BARBARA AS TO DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO NETWORK MINISTRIES HOUSING CORPORATION, A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LOZA, BARBARA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO NETWORK MINISTRIES HOUSING CORPORATION, A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION $7,478.99 PRINCIPAL, $16.44 INTEREST, $225.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $7,720.43, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
